fault_conditions.name: water_flow_left_too_low
fault_conditions.evidence: W-004 - Hydraulic Module: Water flow left too low

fault_conditions.name: water_flow_right_too_low
fault_conditions.evidence: W-005 - Hydraulic Module: Water flow right too low

maintenance_actions.name: close_main_water_inlet_tap
maintenance_actions.interval: specific conditions (e.g. long term storage, actions on water pump ...)
maintenance_actions.evidence: On specific conditions (e.g. long term storage, actions on water pump ...), close the main water inlet tap (3)

assumptions.statement: Water pump is part of the hydraulic module that supplies water to brewing and steam systems
assumptions.reason: Warning codes W-004 and W-005 for low water flow are categorized under 'Hydraulic Module' and the component role specifies water supply to brewing and steam systems

assumptions.statement: Different machine models have different flow rate requirements from the water pump
assumptions.reason: Manual specifies different minimum flow rates for different machine models, indicating pump capacity varies by model
